insight.headline: Customer API Changes
insight.what_changed: The Customer Account API version 2026-10 removes the deprecated Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and the associated Checkout type subtree. This change affects apps using the Customer Account API to manage customer checkouts.
insight.developer_impact: Developers should update their apps to no longer rely on the removed fields. They can use alternative APIs, such as the Storefront API or the GraphQL Admin API, to manage customer checkouts. Additionally, developers should review their app's error handling to ensure it can handle the removal of these fields. The GraphQL Admin API and Customer Account API will return errors if these fields are queried after the deprecation.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants may experience changes in how customer checkouts are managed, but this should not significantly impact their daily operations. Merchants should ensure their apps are updated to handle the removal of these fields.
insight.why_it_matters: This change is part of Shopify's effort to simplify and improve the Customer Account API, making it more efficient for developers to manage customer data. It also ensures that apps are using the most up-to-date and secure APIs.

also_worth_knowing.text: POS UI extensions 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
Shopify Flow: Changes to Action extensions result in fewer breaking changes
Shopify Flow: Action runtime URLs now update automatically

updates.title: POS UI extensions 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
updates.summary: POS UI extensions now use per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts. This change affects the Cart API and how discounts are passed to setLineItemDiscount and bulkSetLineItemDiscounts.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Changes to Action extensions result in fewer breaking changes
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now allows for more control over breaking changes to action extensions, reducing the likelihood of validation failures due to field mismatches.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Action runtime URLs now update automatically
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now automatically updates action runtime URLs on every execution, ensuring that existing workflows use the latest URL after an app is redeployed.
CLI version 4.4.0 has been released with updates to Javy related dependencies, GCS bundle upload status validation, and a fix for long URL wrapping in banner/alert footnotes.

updates.title: Updated App Store Requirements: 1.3 Always Use Honest and Transparent Review Practices
updates.summary: The Shopify App Store requirements policy 1.3 has been updated to clarify the use of honest and transparent review practices for all apps published to the App Store.

updates.title: Customer Account API Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout and Checkout types removed in 2026-10
updates.summary: The Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and the Customer Account API Checkout type subtree have been removed in Customer Account API version 2026-10.

updates.title: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision
updates.summary: The Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision, allowing for sub-region markets to be configured with country-subdivision regions.

updates.title: OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill
updates.summary: The OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus enum now returns a new value, FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED, for orders with no items to fulfill.

updates.title: Deprecating the useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions
updates.summary: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions is deprecated, starting in version 2026-07, and will be removed in a future version.

updates.title: Shop Minis May June 2026 update
updates.summary: The Shop Minis update includes new features such as product variant intents, which provide typed hooks for selecting variants and adding them to cart.

updates.title: Market-driven shipping now available in feature preview
updates.summary: Market-driven shipping is now available in feature preview, allowing merchants to attach shipping options directly to each market and vary rates by product and location.

updates.title: @shopify/mini-oxygen@4.2.0
updates.summary: @shopify/mini-oxygen version 4.2.0 has been released with minor changes, including making the Oxygen Vite plugin self-sufficient and improving worker-specific resolve configuration.

recap.headline: Shopify updates impact GraphQL Admin API, Hydrogen, and Checkout UI extensions

themes.title: API Updates
themes.detail: The GraphQL Admin API 2026-07 now supports MarketRegionSubdivision and OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill. Additionally, the Customer Account API removes the deprecated Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field in version 2026-10.

themes.title: Checkout and UI Extensions
themes.detail: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions is deprecated starting in version 2026-07. POS UI extensions API version 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts. The Shop Minis update includes new features like product variant intents.

themes.title: Shopify Flow and App Updates
themes.detail: Shopify Flow now resolves an action’s runtime_url on every execution and handles breaking changes to an action’s configuration fields more gracefully. The CLI version 4.4.0 includes updates to Javy related dependencies and GCS bundle upload validation.

actions.text: Update GraphQL Admin API to version 2026-07 to support MarketRegionSubdivision
Migrate checkout UI extensions to use the new product variant intent hooks
Review and update app to comply with the updated App Store Requirements policy 1.3
